prompt: Terminal-themed concentric circles diagram showing three nested levels of AI adoption. Innermost circle: a lone software engineer at a glowing terminal workstation with green phosphor text. Middle ring: a small team of 3-4 developers collaborating around shared screens with connecting lines. Outer ring: an organization/building silhouette with network nodes and data streams connecting outward. Dark background (#0a0e14 deep black), phosphor-green (#7ee787) and orange (#f0883e) glow lines and accents, monospace labels at each ring level, sci-fi technical aesthetic. Clean vector-style illustration, no photorealism. Top label: 'AI-First Engineer', middle label: 'AI-First Team', outer label: 'AI-First Organization'. Professional technical diagram style.
